query: UPDATE radio_channels SET streamUrl = 'https://listen.181fm.com/181-classical_128k.mp3', metadata = JSON_SET(COALESCE(metadata, '{}'), '$.fallbackUrl', 'https://ice5.somafm.com/n5md-128-mp3') WHERE id = 16
